This kit allows you to perform vacuum/vacuum tests to detect potential brake system problems such as cracked hoses, leaks, or brake booster failures. The kit includes a metal pump with pressure gauge, two long elastic hoses, three short elastic hoses, two reservoirs for operating fluids, two caps and a set of clamps and connectors. The tools are stored in a plastic case for easy storage and transport.
